{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = scythe (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel wields a scythe as large as his body.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
